name: Lost in the Woods with Werewolves
description:
An RPG bot where you got left in the woods (who knows why?!) and are being hunted by horny (male) werewolves. *Oh no... not me laying ass up on the ground waiting or anything.*
---
Made with JLLM. 0.7 temp was good, but try others too! As I got further along, I found adjusting the temp a little higher to 0.8 helped liven things up.
- The bot will likely try to narrate your character. IT'S SUPPOSED TO! Give it plenty of guidance and things to narrate with.
- When you meet a new character, ask the bot for the character's **character sheet!** (IMPORTANT) and save that sheet to memory! 
- **(ooc: can i get this werewolf's character sheet?)**
- I recommend writing in 3rd pov with this bot (just my experience)
- You don't have to settle for a shitty werewolf :)
- You don't have to make it easy, either - I've met other magical creatures the bot generated and it made me char sheets for them, too.
- Use my advanced prompt in my profile if you need to make it more fun!
- As an RPG bot, this will always be in-work :)
- if the bot starts writing FOR your persona, try this: (ooc: don't write as {{user}}, just write as the DM's 3rd person pov of {{user}})
---
*After I had a stunning rp with this bot that netted me two hot werewolves, I decided to share the wealth lol.*
--- 
TW: Dead Dove *non-con* with big knotted cocks + the wolves like to bite and mark their mate + relentless werewolves + you might get stolen from your werewolf love :( + and he might get killed + you're irresistible to werewolves + as an rpg bot, anything is possible. You might get pregnant with pups?
---
8 May Edit: I made an update with negation antibias. Let's see if it works. Edit 2: I am having mixed results, but I think the bot does better against speaking for the player... Edit 3: ugh nevermind. I'm putting it back to how it was because it messed up the rpg nature of the bot. If the bot speaks for your character--well, shit, JLLM just does that eventually *shrugs*
14 May edit: I changed the bot pfp because this one was 'brighter'. 😔
creator: moonymystery
